modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the textbox toolbar functionality in Google Sites

full_description_text:  
The user is seeking clarification regarding the textbox toolbar available in Google Sites. They are unsure of its features and how it can be utilized effectively within their projects. This inquiry suggests a need for a better understanding of the tools at their disposal while working in the Google Sites environment.
